key_facts: The SME-TR is a transmitter designed for inline process density and viscosity monitoring.
The SME-TR enclosure is made of Aluminum with a Sprayed Polyurethane (PUR) coating.
The O-ring material for the SME-TR is FKM.
The product requires a TMB-TRX Transmitter Mounting Bracket for installation.
Rheonics products, including this device, are used for inline process density and viscosity monitoring.
The product is protected by US and International patents.
